summary: Global --dry-run no longer triggers a real GetOrdersBySubmissionNo call in order hydrate.
reason: The previous implementation force-set c.DryRun=false when EITHER --dry-run-hydrate OR --dry-run was active. Because newClient() also skips wiring the log hook on --dry-run, the resulting live call was unlogged and the daily quota counter undercounted by one. Greptile P1 finding on PR #630.
